span.p: Run the diagnosis DAX. Does the dimension column have any rows at all?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: FIX 0: model / refresh problem. Check semantic model refresh + Dataverse / source connection. NOT this lesson.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Do the actual values match the strings used in the measure filter EXACTLY?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: This lesson. Go to FIX A (short fix) or FIX B (recommended Domain calc column).

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the relationship between Questions and the fact table active and oriented as expected?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Fix the relationship - wrong direction / cross-filter / inactive. Different lesson.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the Category_Weight stored as 0-1 fractional and the SystemScore threshold expressed as 0-100?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: FIX C: scale by x100 (see Score-scale gotcha) OR re-express thresholds in 0-1 terms.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Escalate: run DAX Studio + server-timing capture; the bug is not in filter-string matching. Hand off.
